title: Seratonin
description: Carefully selected vanilla+ mods made for the perfect survival playthrough while having fun
body:
IMPORTANT

This pack is Inspired by the [Melatonin Modpack](https://modrinth.com/modpack/melatonin), Go check it out!

We have a Discord: [The Seratonin Discord](https://discord.gg/vsSJtxKPNu)

# What we offer


I've put together the ultimate Vanilla+ modpack for a slow-paced, cozy, and immersive playthrough. It’s packed with performance upgrades, quality-of-life improvements, and small but meaningful enhancements that stay true to the vanilla spirit—just more polished and feature-rich. With helpful mods like **Antique Atlas**, **REI**, and more, exploring, building, and surviving feels smoother and more enjoyable than ever.

### Highlights:

* **Play with friends easily—no server required**. Local multiplayer made simple.
* **Overhauled audio experience** with improved sound effects for a more immersive world.
* **Hundreds of updated textures** for both vanilla and modded elements.
* **A redesigned enchanting system**, complete with a modern GUI and unique mechanics.
* **Custom dark mode interface** and sleek new font for a cleaner aesthetic.
* **All previously outvoted mobs** from past Minecraft mob votes are included.
* **A refreshed death system**, featuring new death messages, sound effects, and “Soul Keeper” items that function like gravestones.
* **Over 40 new food and drink options** from Farmer’s Delight and Brewin’ & Chewin’.
* **Better minecart functionality** for smoother transport and logistics.
* **Built-in performance-friendly shaders (VanillAA)** to elevate visuals without dropping frames.
* **Expanded mob variety**, with tons of new visual variants and behavior tweaks.
* **New copper uses**, including tools, pistons, and utility blocks.
* **Tons of decorative blocks** like chairs, desks, and tables for cozy builds.
* **Immersive ambient music** that enhances the atmosphere while exploring or building.
* **A variety of new dungeons and structures** scattered across the world to explore.
* **Balanced adjustments** to copper, elytras, shulker boxes, and coordinate usage.
* **Visually and thematically overhauled vanilla biomes** for a more natural and exciting world.
* **A fully reimagined End dimension**, thanks to **BetterEnd** and several companion End-focused mods, offering new biomes, mobs, mechanics, and structures to explore.

This modpack is not only immersive—it’s also lightweight and efficient. With optimization mods like **Sodium**, **Lithium**, **Starlight**, and **C2ME**, it runs smoothly even on low-spec machines (tested on one personally!). Almost every mod is customizable through the in-game settings menu, so you can tweak the experience to match your style.
